server/src/image_tool/queue.py :: JobStatus
class JobStatus(str, Enum):
    QUEUED = "queued"
    PROCESSING = "processing"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    FAILED = "failed"
    PARTIAL = "partial"

server/src/image_tool/queue.py :: ItemStatus
class ItemStatus(str, Enum):
    PENDING = "pending"
    PROCESSING = "processing"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    FAILED = "failed"

server/src/image_tool/queue.py :: QueueItem
class QueueItem:
    id: str
    source_name: str
    data: bytes
    status: ItemStatus = ItemStatus.PENDING
    error: str | None = None
    output: bytes | None = None
    output_extension: str | None = None
    mime: str | None = None
    started_at: float | None = None
    finished_at: float | None = None

    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
        return {
            "id": self.id,
            "source_name": self.source_name,
            "status": self.status.value,
            "error": self.error,
            "output_size": len(self.output) if self.output else None,
            "output_extension": self.output_extension,
            "started_at": self.started_at,
            "finished_at": self.finished_at,
        }

server/src/image_tool/queue.py :: BatchQueue
class BatchQueue:
    def __init__(
        self,
        max_jobs: int = 100,
        max_items_per_job: int = 50,
        max_file_bytes: int = 25 * 1024 * 1024,
        on_job_update: Callable[[BatchJob], None] | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.max_jobs = max_jobs
        self.max_items_per_job = max_items_per_job
        self.max_file_bytes = max_file_bytes
        self.on_job_update = on_job_update
        self._jobs: dict[str, BatchJob] = {}
        self._order: list[str] = []
        self._lock = threading.Lock()
        self._condition = threading.Condition(self._lock)
        self._stop = threading.Event()
        self._worker = threading.Thread(target=self._run_worker, name="batch-queue-worker", daemon=True)

    def start(self) -> None:
        if not self._worker.is_alive():
            self._stop.clear()
            self._worker.start()

    def stop(self) -> None:
        self._stop.set()
        with self._condition:
            self._condition.notify_all()
        if self._worker.is_alive():
            self._worker.join(timeout=5)

    def create_job(
        self,
        format_name: str,
        files: list[tuple[str, bytes]],
        max_mb: float = 1.

server/src/image_tool/queue.py :: _safe_stem
def _safe_stem(name: str) -> str:
    stem = name.rsplit(".", 1)[0] if "." in name else name
    cleaned = "".join(character if character.isalnum() or character in "-_" else "_" for character in stem)
    return cleaned[:80] or "image"
